summary:
**Note to Dining Services Staff:**

This week's feedback data was extremely limited, consisting of only one comment. As such, this report will be significantly shorter and less detailed than usual. We encourage all students to provide more feedback through our channels so we can offer more actionable insights in future reports.

## Overview
Student feedback this week was minimal, with only one comment received regarding "Calabasitas." There is no overall sentiment or clear takeaways to report due to the lack of data.

## House Dinner
No feedback this week.

## Browne Menu
*   **Most-praised dishes:** No specific dishes were praised this week.
*   **Most-criticized dishes:** No specific dishes were criticized this week.
*   **Other comments:**
    *   **Calabasitas:** "test" (Note: The context for this comment, including whether it was positive or negative, and which meal period it refers to, is unclear from the provided data.)
*   **Recurring themes:** No recurring themes emerged this week.
*   **Rating trends:** No rating trends were discernible this week.

## Action items for dining services
Due to the extremely limited feedback, there are no concrete action items to recommend this week. We recommend encouraging students to submit more detailed feedback to help us improve.
